Guest Stories

What Keeps Guests Coming Back

Clean, updated, and spacious suites. A great value — great location, 3 minutes from the beach and 3 short blocks from shopping and dining.

— Mary

Our room was spacious and pleasant. Having a full kitchen — literally bigger than that of my apartment! — was an extra pleasure. We'll absolutely be back.

— Adam Z.

My family and I have visited Watson's many times over the years. Always clean, love the fully equipped kitchen. The only place we choose to stay!

— PM, Returning Guest
